approvalNote: Peter selected John of the North with the Dry Sarcastic script on 2026-06-16 and asked to make the assets for the full JobDone Yorkshire enterprise-interruption advert. V2 keeps the spoken URL in dotted form, matching Peter's no-slash URL rule.

corporate_daniel.role: Smooth enterprise-style advert opener, there to be interrupted

yorkshire_john_dry.role: Dry sarcastic Yorkshire-ish no-nonsense tradesman voice selected by Peter

app_lily_phone.role: Fast, calm JobDone app response voice

takes.speaker: corporate_voice
takes.text: Introducing the next generation productivity platform for trade professionals.
takes.title: JobDone Yorkshire Enterprise - Corporate Opener

takes.speaker: yorkshireman
takes.text: No. Stop that. It's not a platform. It's a job diary, lad. Revolutionary, I know. You say what happened before you drive off, then JobDone helps you find it later.
takes.title: JobDone Yorkshire Enterprise - John Dry Sarcastic Interruption

takes.speaker: app_voice
takes.text: Captured. Mrs Jones. Kitchen tap. Washer replaced. Isolation valve stiff.
takes.title: JobDone Yorkshire Enterprise - App Capture

takes.speaker: yorkshireman
takes.text: You check it, confirm it, and next time you're there, ask what you did there last time.
takes.title: JobDone Yorkshire Enterprise - John Confirm Recall Bridge

takes.speaker: app_voice
takes.text: Found it. Mrs Jones. Kitchen tap. Washer replaced. Isolation valve stiff.
takes.title: JobDone Yorkshire Enterprise - App Recall

takes.speaker: yorkshireman
takes.text: JobDone. Get it out of your head before you forget it. Go to jobdone.continuumkit.org.
takes.title: JobDone Yorkshire Enterprise - John Tagline URL
